channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [WELSPLSOL] Welspun Specialty Solutions Ltd. Approves Re-Appointment of Two Independent Directors
item.description:
The Board of Directors of Welspun Specialty Solutions Ltd. has approved the re-appointment of Mr. K H Viswanathan and Ms. Amita Misra as Independent Directors for a second term of 4 consecutive years, subject to shareholder approval through postal ballot. Mr. Viswanathan brings 38 years of experience in Risk Advisory and Corporate Structuring, while Ms. Misra has a Postgraduate degree in Cost & Management Accounting and 38+ years of experience in various government & international organizations. The re-appointment is not subject to any SEBI order or any other such authority debarring them from holding the office of a director.

  • Re-appointment of Mr. K H Viswanathan as an Independent Director for a second term of 4 years.
  • Re-appointment of Ms. Amita Misra as an Independent Director for a second term of 4 years.
  • Appointments subject to approval of shareholders through postal ballot.
  • Mr. Viswanathan has 38 years of experience in Risk Advisory and Corporate Structuring.
  • Ms. Misra has a Postgraduate degree in Cost & Management Accounting and 38+ years of experience in various government & international organizations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Welspun Specialty Solutions Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [GVFILM] GV Films Ltd Schedules Board Meeting to Consider Appointment of Independent Director(s)
item.description:
GV Films Ltd has informed the BSE that the meeting of the Board of Directors of the company is scheduled on 10/03/2026. The agenda includes the consideration and approval of the appointment of Independent Director(s) of the company and any other business with the permission of the Board. The meeting was previously scheduled for 09/03/2025 but has been rescheduled to 10/03/2026.

  • GV Films Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on 10/03/2026
  • The agenda includes the consideration and approval of the appointment of Independent Director(s)
  • The meeting was originally scheduled for 09/03/2025 but has been rescheduled to 10/03/2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: GV FILMS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [PNGSREVA] PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd Opens 34th Shop-in-Shop (SIS) Store with P. N. Gadgil & Sons Limited
item.description:
PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd has announced the opening of a new retail store in Shop-in-shop (SIS) format with P. N. Gadgil & Sons Limited at Tribeca Highstreet, Pune. This addition brings the total number of SIS stores with P. N. Gadgil & Sons Limited to 34 and the total number of Exclusive Brand Stores (EBO) to 1.

  • PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd opens a new SIS store with P. N. Gadgil & Sons Limited at Tribeca Highstreet, Pune.
  • This is the 34th SIS store for the company with P. N. Gadgil & Sons Limited.
  • The company also has 1 Exclusive Brand Store (EBO).

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: PNGS Reva Diamond Jewellery Ltd | Category: New Launch

item.title: [LXCHEM] Laxmi Organic Industries Challenged by Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company in APTEL
item.description:
Laxmi Organic Industries Limited has submitted a disclosure regarding a litigation update. The company has received an intimation that an appeal has been filed by Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company Limited (MSEDCL) before the Appellate Tribunal for Electricity (APTEL) against the Company and the Maharashtra Electricity Regulatory Commission (MERC). The appeal challenges the Final Order dated September 17, 2025, passed by MERC in Case No. 137 of 2025 in favour of the Company. The appeal is still pending admission by APTEL, and the company believes it is not sustainable. If APTEL admits the appeal and grants a stay on the operation of the Final Order, the company may be exposed to a maximum potential financial impact of approximately ₹407.27 million, together with any applicable interest.

  • An appeal has been filed by Maharashtra State Electricity Distribution Company Limited (MSEDCL) before the Appellate Tribunal for Electricity (APTEL) against Laxmi Organic Industries Limited and the Maharashtra Electricity Regulatory Commission (MERC).
  • The appeal challenges the Final Order dated September 17, 2025, passed by MERC in Case No. 137 of 2025 in favour of the company.
  • The company believes the appeal is not sustainable.
  • If APTEL admits the appeal and grants a stay on the operation of the Final Order, the company may face a potential financial impact of approximately ₹407.27 million.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Laxmi Organic Industries Ltd | Category: Legal

item.title: [DHRUVCA] Dhruva Capital Services Ltd: Board Meeting Approves Resignation of Two Independent Directors and Appointment of Three New Independent Directors
item.description:
Dhruva Capital Services Ltd announced the outcome of its board meeting held on March 9, 2026. The meeting resulted in the resignation of two independent directors, Mrs. Chanchal Kedia and Ms. Hitu Gambhir Mahajan, due to pre-occupancy. The board has approved the appointment of three new independent directors, Mrs. Kiran Pandey, Mr. Priyanshu Gupta, and Mr. Dipayan Das, subject to shareholder approval. The company also announced the resignation of Mrs. Priti Lakhotia as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer.

  • Resignation of Mrs. Chanchal Kedia and Ms. Hitu Gambhir Mahajan due to pre-occupancy.
  • Appointment of Mrs. Kiran Pandey, Mr. Priyanshu Gupta, and Mr. Dipayan Das as new independent directors, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Mrs. Priti Lakhotia's resignation from the position of Company Secretary and Compliance Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: DHRUVA CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [JCTLTD] 12th Meeting of Committee of Creditors for J C T Limited Scheduled on 10th March, 2026
item.description:
The 12th meeting of the Committee of Creditors (CoC) for J C T Limited is scheduled to take place on Tuesday, 10th March, 2026, at 11:00 am in Delhi. This intimation is for information and record purposes.

  • 12th meeting of CoC for J C T Limited announced
  • Meeting to be held on 10th March, 2026
  • Scheduled at 11:00 am in Delhi

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: JCT LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAILTEL] RailTel Corporation Declares 2nd Interim Dividend for FY 2025-26 at Re. 1 per Share
item.description:
RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has declared the 2nd interim dividend for the financial year 2025-26 at the rate of 10% of paid-up share capital, which translates to Re. 1 per share. The record date for the purpose of payment of this dividend is set as 13th March 2026, and the payment date is 24th March 2026. The Board meeting commenced at 1130 Hrs and concluded at 1420 Hrs.

  • RailTel Corporation declares 2nd interim dividend for FY 2025-26 at Re. 1 per share
  • Record date for dividend payment set as 13th March 2026
  • Payment date for dividend is 24th March 2026
  • The Board meeting commenced at 1130 Hrs and concluded at 1420 Hrs

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [UNITINT] Unitech International Ltd. Holds 6th Meeting of Committee of Creditors
item.description:
Unitech International Ltd. conducted the 6th meeting of its Committee of Creditors (CoC) on 02.03.2026, Monday at 04:00 P.M. The meeting was held in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation & Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015 and sub-clause 16(g) of Clause A of Part- A Schedule I11. The meeting was conducted through video conferencing, and the company has requested that this information be considered as material under the applicable provision of SEBI (Listing Obligation & Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015.

  • Unitech International Ltd. conducted the 6th meeting of its Committee of Creditors (CoC).
  • The meeting was held in accordance with Regulation 30 of the SEBI (Listing Obligation & Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015 and sub-clause 16(g) of Clause A of Part- A Schedule I11.
  • The meeting was conducted through video conferencing.
  • The company has requested that this information be considered as material under the applicable provision of SEBI (Listing Obligation & Disclosure Requirements) Regulation, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: UNITECH INTERNATIONAL LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [LICI] Life Insurance Corporation of India Faces GST, Interest, and Penalty Demand in Himachal Pradesh
item.description:
The Life Insurance Corporation of India (LIC) has received a demand order for Goods & Service Tax (GST), Interest, and penalty for the financial year 2019-20 from the Deputy Commissioner State Taxes and Excise, Parwanoo- Himachal Pradesh. The demand is for a total amount of INR 62,03,166. The order is appealable before the Commissioner (Appeals), Shimla, Himachal Pradesh. The demand does not have a material impact on the Corporation's financials, operations, or other activities as of March 09, 2026.

  • Life Insurance Corporation of India has received a demand order for GST, Interest, and penalty for Himachal Pradesh state.
  • The demand is for the financial year 2019-20 and amounts to INR 62,03,166.
  • The order is appealable before the Commissioner (Appeals), Shimla, Himachal Pradesh.
  • There is no material impact on the Corporation's financials, operations, or other activities as of March 09, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Life Insurance Corporation of India | Category: Legal

item.title: [RAILTEL] RailTel Corporation Declares 2nd Interim Dividend of 10% for FY 2025-26
item.description:
RailTel Corporation of India Ltd has declared a 2nd interim dividend at the rate of 10% of paid-up share capital, which is Re 1/- per share. The record date for the purpose of payment of this dividend is Friday, 13th March 2026. The payment date for the dividend is Tuesday, 24 March 2026. The board meeting commenced at 1130 Hrs and concluded at 1420 Hrs.

  • RailTel Corporation declares 2nd interim dividend of 10% for FY 2025-26
  • Record date for dividend payment is 13th March 2026
  • Payment date for dividend is 24th March 2026
  • Board meeting commenced at 1130 Hrs and concluded at 1420 Hrs

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RailTel Corporation of India Ltd | Category: Dividend
